name: Cohen Brothers Coin & Pawn - Calumet City
description_short: Cohen Brothers Pawn in Calumet City offers instant cash loans secured by collateral including jewelry, electronics, and personal items, with an in-house jewelry expert.
description_long:
Cohen Brothers Pawn operates as a pawn shop in Calumet City, Illinois, specializing in collateral-based lending and the purchase of used goods. The business is located at 1243 Hirsch Ave near the intersection of Hirsch Ave and River Oaks Dr, with standard operating hours from 9 AM to 6 PM most days and 10 AM to 5 PM on Sundays.

The company offers instant cash loans on items of value, with a stated focus on jewelry appraisal and sales. According to their profile, they accept a wide range of collateral including jewelry, televisions, gaming systems, and mobile phones. They emphasize that their lead jewelry pawnbroker has fifteen years of experience in appraising and selling jewelry, positioning this as a key differentiator in their service offerings.

What distinguishes Cohen Brothers is the claimed expertise of their jewelry specialist with fifteen years of industry experience. The business advertises competitive quotes and positions itself as offering fair valuations compared to typical pawn shops. Customer feedback suggests they maintain a wide selection of merchandise and project a professional image when service quality meets expectations.

However, the company faces significant credibility concerns based on available reviews. Of four reviews on file, one is highly positive while three are negative, citing issues including undervaluation of precious metals, lost merchandise (shoes), permanent closure claims, and reports of rude staff. The most recent negative review (03/09/20) explicitly states the location is closed permanently, creating serious questions about current operational status. The conflicting information about whether the business is currently open makes verification essential before attempting to engage their services.
address: 408 River Oaks Dr, Calumet City, IL 60409

company_info.headquarters: 408 River Oaks Dr, Calumet City, IL 60409

pros: In-house jewelry pawnbroker with fifteen years of appraisal and sales experience
Accepts wide range of collateral including jewelry, electronics, gaming systems, and phones
Advertises instant cash loans with same-day funding capability
Reports of wide merchandise selection available for purchase
Accessible location near intersection of Hirsch Ave and River Oaks Dr
Website available at cohenpawn.com for additional information
cons: Three of four available reviews are negative, with complaints of undervaluation on precious metals
Recent customer reported permanent closure in March 2020, but current listing status unclear
Customer complaints of lost merchandise and poor tracking systems
Reports of rude and unprofessional staff interactions
Low overall rating of 2.0 stars based on limited review sample
best_for: Consumers with jewelry or watches needing quick cash and willing to verify current operational status
Sellers of used electronics, gaming systems, or phones seeking immediate payment
Individuals in the Calumet City area familiar with the shop's reputation and staff
diagnosis: Cohen Brothers Pawn is best for consumers in the Calumet City area with items of value to pawn or sell who have prior positive experience with the business. Critical caveat: verify current operational status before visiting, as a March 2020 review claims permanent closure, and the 2.0-star rating with predominantly negative reviews suggests significant service quality concerns regarding valuation fairness and staff professionalism.
services: Instant cash loans on collateral (jewelry, electronics, games, phones)
